description: Reads in a folder with files and applies filtering to each file. The main steps include reading in the folder, selecting the files, and applying a filter to each file.

c535e2cb-d594-4216-af0f-13ed4beeabb5.name: table-merge-tables
c535e2cb-d594-4216-af0f-13ed4beeabb5.description:
Merges multiple tables into one table by merging the list of rows. Columns are automatically created if they do not exist.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

cb7caeee-d0bc-4877-9535-9b06257fd57a.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
cb7caeee-d0bc-4877-9535-9b06257fd57a.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.
